title: Peppery Crispy Polish Potato Salad
description: A festive, lowfat Polish potato salad with a peppery bhuna kick and creamy Stilton dressing, perfect for holidays or gatherings.
instructions: 1. Place diced potatoes in a large pot and cover with cold water.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes until tender but not mushy.
3. Drain the potatoes and transfer them to a bowl of ice water to stop cooking; let them cool.
4. While the potatoes cool, heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a small pan over medium heat.
5. Add black pepper, smoked paprika, cumin, and oregano to the oil; sauté for 1–2 minutes until fragrant (bhuna style).
6. Remove the pepper mixture from heat and let it cool slightly.
7. In a large mixing bowl, combine low‑fat yogurt, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt.
8. Add the cooled potatoes, sautéed pepper mixture, chopped parsley, and diced red onion to the bowl.
9. Gently fold in crumbled low‑fat Stilton cheese until evenly distributed.
10. Taste the salad and adjust seasoning if needed; refrigerate 30 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
